title: RoutineLayout (V1)
description: Canvas-mode metadata for a routine: per-step node positions plus the edge graph between them. Carried inline in spec_yaml so canvas mode is fully round-trippable without a separate persistence layer. The V1 runtime engine ignores `layout` entirely.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on breaking layout-format changes.

nodes.description: Node positions keyed by the corresponding step id. Steps without an entry render at an inferred position.

collapsed.description: If true, the canvas renders the node in compact form (id + type only).

edges.description: Directed edges between step nodes. The runtime engine still walks `steps:` in array order; this is purely the visual graph.

kind.description: Edge semantics. `true`/`false` are the two branches leaving an `if`-flavored node and compile to `when:` gates on the target. `success` is the default sequential edge.

label.description: Optional human-readable label rendered on the edge.
